scripts.build:prerender: npm run verify:vercel-config && vite build && npm run build-knowledge && node scripts/verify-journal-integrity.mjs && node scripts/verify-publish-eligibility.mjs && node scripts/generate-llms-full.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/generate-static-journal-html.mjs && node scripts/generate-static-faq-html.mjs && node scripts/copy-public-to-dist.mjs && PRERENDER_SKIP_INNER_BUILD=1 node scripts/prerender.mjs && node scripts/verify-dist-html.mjs && node scripts/verify-dist-marketing-html.mjs && node scripts/verify-dist-faq-html.mjs && node scripts/verify-dist-llms.mjs && node scripts/verify-deployment-html.mjs
scripts.build:no-prerender: npm run verify:vercel-config && vite build && npm run build-knowledge && node scripts/verify-publish-eligibility.mjs && node scripts/generate-llms-full.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/generate-static-journal-html.mjs && node scripts/generate-static-faq-html.mjs && node scripts/copy-public-to-dist.mjs && node scripts/verify-dist-html.mjs && node scripts/verify-dist-faq-html.mjs && node scripts/verify-dist-llms.mjs
scripts.prerender:local: npm run build:no-prerender && PRERENDER_SKIP_INNER_BUILD=1 node scripts/prerender.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
